verdict: AlphaVest is a strong demo workflow simulator, but it does not yet support real document upload and does not yet provide generalized operational data maintenance for many visible workflows.

evidence: components/client-intake-screen.tsx document upload screen is visual/static
topFindings.nextStep: Add multipart upload API, storage adapter, persisted document/version/extraction/evidence/audit rows, and UI reload.

evidence: Client/family/entity/tenant/governance screens use static field components in key places
Workflow API receives actionId instead of typed user payloads
topFindings.nextStep: Convert top masks to controlled forms and domain services.
Generate a real demo binary artifact and signed download route.

evidence: Governance confirmation phrase controls are read-only/static in critical drawers
Permission engine can deny, but UI payload confirmation is not operational
topFindings.nextStep: Add editable confirmation phrase validation and audited denied attempts.

evidence: Communication screen buttons and fields do not create persisted messages/call records
topFindings.nextStep: Add communication service for drafts, sends, call notes, and linked audit events.

priorityBacklog: GAP-002 Convert static fields to persisted forms
GAP-003 Add typed payload APIs beyond actionId
recommendedNextPrompt: Use Max. Implement GAP-001 as a narrow vertical slice. Keep the demo journey harness intact, but add a real document upload path: browser file input plus drag/drop, multipart API, local demo storage adapter, document/version/extraction/audit/evidence persistence, UI reload from DB, and tests proving upload, rejection, and persisted reload. Do not introduce real auth or real client data. Update the Phase and QA reports with files changed, tests run, and remaining limitations.
